title: thamnocalamus chigar
side_effects: Thamnocalamus chigar can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in some individuals. Ingesting the plant's extracts can also lead to nausea, vomiting, and stomach cramps. Prolonged exposure to the plant's chemicals may cause damage to the liver and kidneys, resulting in symptoms like fatigue, dark urine, and yellowing of the skin and eyes. Improper use of the thamnocalamus chigar plant may also cause cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat, high blood pressure, and even heart failure in severe cases.
